item.title: 苹果国行 AI 凌晨意外上线后被撤下
item.guid: 苹果国行-AI-凌晨意外上线后被撤下
item.description:
Early this morning, Apple Intelligence suddenly appeared on the settings page of Chinese iPhone users, and Apple quickly took it offline. Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman explicitly stated that the feature has not yet been officially approved, and its appearance this time was an accidental event, unrelated to the iOS 26.5 beta. 今天凌晨，Apple Intelligence 突然出现在国行 iPhone 用户的设置页面中，随后苹果迅速将其下线。 彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 明确表示，该功能目前尚未正式获批，此次上线系意外事件，且与 iOS 26.5 测试版无关。

APPSO discovered that the original "Siri" entry on the settings page of Chinese iPhones has been renamed "Apple Intelligence and Siri." After clicking, users can download the on-device model and unlock a series of AI features. With only one day left until Apple's 50th anniversary (April 1st), Apple Intelligence landed on Chinese users' phones in this almost silent manner. APPSO 发现，国行 iPhone 设置页面中原有的「Siri」入口已更名为「Apple 智能与 Siri」，点击后可下载端侧模型并解锁一系列 AI 功能。距离苹果成立 50 周年纪念日（4 月 1 日）仅剩一天，Apple Intelligence 以这种几乎静默的方式落在了国行用户的手机上。

🔗 Related reading: Breaking! Apple's Chinese AI secretly launched, we found these details after overnight testing 🔗 相关阅读： 突发！苹果国行 AI 偷跑上线，连夜实测后我们发现了这些细节

Gurman provided three reasons to judge this as an accident: Gurman 给出了三条判断这是一次意外的依据：

Apple would not launch AI features in China's most important market without any official announcement; Apple would not choose to release it in the early hours of China time; furthermore, the feature uses Google's visual recognition engine, and Google services are not normally accessible in China.

APPSO completed the first-time activation and actual testing before the feature was taken offline. The features launched this time include the new Siri interface, writing tools, Photo Playground, AI Eraser, Visual Look Up, and Translate. APPSO 在功能下线前完成了第一时间的激活与实测。此次上线的功能包括全新 Siri 界面、写作工具、图乐园、AI 消除、视觉智能及翻译等。

Regarding model invocation, the situation is more complex. The visual recognition engine was confirmed to be from Google through actual testing; during Siri conversations and content generation, APPSO's tests showed instances of GPT being called, and some users online also reported invoking Baidu's Wenxin large model. 在模型调用方面，情况则较为复杂。视觉识别引擎经实测来自 Google；Siri 对话与内容生成环节，APPSO 实测中出现了调用 GPT 的情况，网络上也有用户反馈调出了百度文心大模型。

This is a significant deviation from the industry's previous widespread expectation that "the Chinese version would only integrate Baidu and Alibaba models." 这与此前业界普遍预期的「国行版仅接入百度与阿里模型」存在明显出入。

Apple Intelligence debuted at WWDC24 in June 2024 and was first launched in the U.S. in October of the same year with iOS 18.1. Last March, the iOS 18.4 update enabled support for Simplified Chinese. Apple Intelligence 于 2024 年 6 月的 WWDC24 首次亮相，同年 10 月随 iOS 18.1 在美国率先上线。去年 3 月，iOS 18.4 更新使其支持简体中文。

However, the launch date for the Chinese version has since been repeatedly postponed, from the initially targeted mid-last year, successively delayed to iOS 18.6, iOS 26.1, iOS 26.2, and iOS 26.4. 然而，国行版上线日期此后经历了多次推迟，从最初锚定的去年中期，依次推迟至 iOS 18.6、iOS 26.1、iOS 26.2、iOS 26.4。

Last November, Gurman stated bluntly in his Power On column that the launch of the Chinese version was "far off," and pointed out that in addition to approval issues, the engineering progress of Apple Intelligence itself was not smooth, and model performance did not meet expectations. 去年 11 月，Gurman 在其 Power On 专栏中直言，国行版落地「遥遥无期」，并指出除审批问题外，Apple Intelligence 本身的工程进展也不顺利，模型性能未达预期。

Currently, Apple has taken down the accidentally launched version, and the official release date for the Chinese version of Apple Intelligence remains unclear. 目前，苹果已将此次意外上线的版本下线，国行 Apple Intelligence 的正式发布时间仍未明确。

item.title: 张雪机车 WSBK 葡萄牙站两连冠，中国摩托首破欧美日垄断
item.guid: 张雪机车-WSBK-葡萄牙站两连冠，中国摩托首破欧美日垄断
item.description:
According to reports from Jimu News and Jiemian News, from March 28 to 29 local time, Chinese motorcycle brand ZXMOTO (Zhangxue Motorcycle) won two consecutive rounds in the WSBK Portugal SSP middleweight category, becoming the first Chinese motorcycle brand to top a WSBK race, breaking decades of monopoly by European, American, and Japanese manufacturers like Ducati and Yamaha. 据极目新闻、界面新闻报道，当地时间 3 月 28 日至 29 日，中国摩托车品牌张雪机车（ZXMOTO）在 WSBK 葡萄牙站 SSP 中量级组别连续两回合夺冠，成为首个在 WSBK 分站赛登顶的中国摩托车品牌，打破了杜卡迪、雅马哈等欧美日厂商长达数十年的垄断。

🔗 Related reading: China's First Crown! Going head-to-head with Ducati, surpassing Yamaha, Zhang Xue has become the "Lei Jun" of the motorcycle world 🔗 相关阅读： 中国首冠！硬刚杜卡迪，超越雅马哈，张雪活成了摩托车圈的「雷军」

French rider Valentin Debise completed two consecutive victories driving the brand's self-developed 820RR-RS racing bike. 法国车手瓦伦丁·德比斯驾驶品牌自研 820RR-RS 赛车完成两连冠。

The bike is equipped with a self-developed three-cylinder engine, with a maximum speed of 16,000 rpm. It's worth noting that ZXMOTO only achieved 19th and 24th place at the first round in Australia in February this year, making this victory a complete comeback within just over a month. 该车搭载自研三缸发动机，最高转速可达 16000 转。值得注意的是，张雪机车今年 2 月在首站澳大利亚站仅获第 19 名和第 24 名，此番夺冠可谓一个多月内完成的彻底逆袭。

Brand founder Zhang Xue was born in rural Huaihua, Hunan in 1987, starting as a car repair apprentice. He founded ZXMOTO under his own name in April 2024, meaning the brand has been established for less than two years. 品牌创始人张雪 1987 年生于湖南怀化农村，修车学徒出身，2024 年 4 月才以自己名字创立张雪机车，品牌成立至今不足两年。

Furthermore, after actor Yin Zheng posted congratulations on Weibo, Zhang Xue responded by saying he "didn't have money" for an endorsement, and decided to directly gift an 820, asking him to share his real feelings after riding it. The standard 820RR version sells for 43,800 yuan, and the 820RR-R version sells for approximately 61,000 yuan. 此外，演员尹正在微博发文祝贺后，张雪回应称「没钱」请代言，决定直接赠送一台 820，请其骑行后分享真实感受。820RR 标准版售价 43800 元，820RR-R 版售价约 61000 元。

item.title: 苹果开源编程语言 Swift 正式支持 Android
item.guid: 苹果开源编程语言-Swift-正式支持-Android
item.description:
Recently, Apple's open-source programming language Swift officially launched official support for the Android platform, with the first Swift SDK for Android now officially available, nearly a year after the plan was announced. 近日，苹果旗下开源编程语言 Swift，正式推出了对 Android 平台的官方支持，首个 Swift SDK for Android 已正式上线，距离该计划官宣已过去近一年时间。

With this SDK, developers can start developing native Android applications using Swift, and update existing Swift projects to support Android builds... This is an important milestone, opening up new opportunities for Swift's cross-platform development.

From a technical implementation perspective, building Swift packages on Android requires cross-compilation, meaning compiling code on a desktop host platform like macOS or Linux into a program that can run on an Android device or emulator. 从技术实现层面来看，在 Android 上构建 Swift 包需要进行交叉编译，即在 macOS 或 Linux 等桌主机平台上，将代码编译为可在 Android 设备或模拟器上运行的程序。

The complete toolchain consists of three parts: the Swift Toolchain (core compiler), Swift SDK for Android (an extended support package specifically for Android cross-compilation), and Android NDK (providing platform-specific headers, system libraries, and linker tools). Currently, the SDK supports both x86_64 and aarch64 Android architectures. 完整的工具链由三部分组成：Swift 工具链（核心编译器）、Swift SDK for Android（专为 Android 交叉编译提供的扩展支持包），以及 Android NDK（提供平台专属头文件、系统库和链接器工具）。目前该 SDK 支持 x86_64 和 aarch64 两种 Android 架构。

Theoretically, a single Swift codebase could eventually run on both iOS and Android, significantly reducing the barrier and cost of cross-platform porting. Of course, Kotlin remains the absolute primary language for Android development, and Swift's addition primarily expands developers' choices rather than replacing the existing ecosystem. 理论上，一套 Swift 代码未来可在 iOS 和 Android 双端通行，跨平台移植的门槛和成本将大幅降低。当然，Kotlin 目前仍是 Android 开发的绝对主力语言，Swift 的加入更多是拓展了开发者的选择空间，而非替代现有生态。

item.title: OpenAI 关停 Sora 细节：每天亏损百万美元，迪士尼高管在官宣前一小时才得知
item.guid: OpenAI-关停-Sora-细节：每天亏损百万美元，迪士尼高管在官宣前一小时才得知
item.description:
Yesterday, The Wall Street Journal revealed details about OpenAI's recent shutdown of its video generation app "Sora." This product, once likened by CEO Sam Altman to a "GPT moment," was publicly launched in September last year and completely ceased operations in less than half a year. 昨天，《华尔街日报》披露了不久前 OpenAI 关停旗下视频生成 App「Sora」的相关细节。这款曾被 CEO Sam Altman 比作「GPT 时刻」的产品，从去年 9 月公开上线到彻底停运，前后不足半年。

The report pointed out that the decision to shut down directly impacted the collaboration between OpenAI and Disney. In December last year, the two companies announced a multi-year cooperation agreement, with Disney committing to license over 200 IP characters and invest $1 billion. 报道指出，关停决定对 OpenAI 与迪士尼的合作造成直接冲击。去年 12 月，两家公司宣布达成多年合作协议，迪士尼承诺授权超过 200 个 IP 角色并投资 10 亿美元。

However, several Disney executives were only informed of this news less than an hour before the official announcement. Currently, this investment has never materialized, and the cooperation between the two parties has effectively stalled. Disney's new CEO, Josh D’Amaro, is currently negotiating with more than a dozen partners to introduce other AI tools. 然而，迪士尼多位高管是在官宣前不到一小时才获知这一消息。 目前，这笔投资从未兑现，双方合作实际上已陷入停滞。迪士尼新任 CEO Josh D’Amaro 正与十余家合作伙伴就引入其他 AI 工具展开磋商。

The report also stated that Altman initially allocated significant resources to Sora because he hoped OpenAI could become a company that uses AI to reshape popular culture and entertainment. 报道还称，Altman 最初给予 Sora 大量资源，是因为他希望 OpenAI 能成为一家利用 AI 重塑流行文化与娱乐的公司。

In an internal letter to employees, Altman characterized the shutdown as a "difficult but necessary trade-off" and stated that the Sora team would transition to focus on longer-term directions such as robotics. Additionally, OpenAI is fully advancing a new model codenamed "Spud" and plans to build a "super app" focused on productivity scenarios. Altman 在致员工的内部信中将此次关停定性为「艰难但必要的取舍」，并表示 Sora 团队将转型聚焦机器人等更长远的方向。此外，OpenAI 正全力推进代号「Spud」的新模型，并计划打造主打生产力场景的「超级应用」。

In its early days, Sora topped the App Store charts, with global peak users reaching approximately 1 million, but it subsequently continuously shrank to less than 500,000, incurring daily losses of about $1 million. 上线初期，Sora 曾冲上 App Store 榜首，全球用户峰值约 100 万，但此后持续萎缩至不足 50 万，每天亏损约 100 万美元。

The training cost of video models is much higher than that of language models. Against the backdrop of OpenAI's increasingly strained computing resources, Sora was internally considered an "unprofitable" burden. 视频模型的训练成本远高于语言模型，在 OpenAI 算力资源日趋紧张的背景下，Sora 被内部视为「得不偿失」的负担。

item.title: ClawBench 最新榜单：智谱 GLM-5-Turbo 登顶，字节、小米四款模型跻身全球前十
item.guid: ClawBench-最新榜单：智谱-GLM-5-Turbo-登顶，字节、小米四款模型跻身全球前十
item.description:
Agent evaluation firm ClawBench yesterday released its latest large model ranking, covering 30 complex agent tasks across five core business scenarios: office collaboration, information retrieval, content creation, data processing, and software engineering. Agent 评测机构 ClawBench 昨日发布了最新大模型榜单，覆盖 30 项复杂 Agent 任务，涵盖办公协作、信息检索、内容创作、数据处理与软件工程五大核心业务场景。

This ranking includes over 40 mainstream large models, with a total of 4 domestic models from Zhipu, ByteDance, and Xiaomi making it into the global top ten. 本次榜单共收录逾 40 款主流大模型，智谱、字节跳动、小米共计 4 款国产模型跻身全球前十。

    Zhipu GLM-5-Turbo topped the list with a CLAW SCORE of 93.9, becoming the model with the strongest overall performance in this evaluation;

    ByteDance Doubao-Seed-2.0-lite ranked second with 93.1 points, and its usage cost is only $0.33, the lowest on the entire list;

    Xiaomi MiMo-V2-Omni ranked 9th with 91.2 points, boasting the fastest running speed on the entire list, completing the full set of tasks in just 848 seconds.

Looking at the overall ranking, OpenAI GPT-5.4 ranked third with 92.2 points, Claude Opus 4.5 ranked seventh with 91.5 points, and Alibaba Qwen3.5-35B-A3B ranked eighth with 91.4 points. 从整体榜单来看，OpenAI GPT-5.4 以 92.2 分位列第三，Claude Opus 4.5 以 91.5 分排名第七，阿里 Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 以 91.4 分位列第八。

ClawBench adopts an isolated sandbox execution mechanism, where each model must complete tasks in a realistically simulated enterprise development environment, deliberately embedding engineering challenges such as "inconsistent naming," "missing directories," and "date traps." ClawBench 采用隔离沙箱执行机制，每款模型须在真实模拟的企业开发环境中完成任务，并刻意内嵌「命名不一致」「目录缺失」「日期陷阱」等工程挑战。

Regarding scoring, ClawBench introduces a "triple scoring mechanism," using automated script assertions, cutting-edge LLMs acting as "expert judges," and a hybrid scoring method combining both in a weighted manner, aiming to more accurately reflect the model's actual deployment capabilities in complex workflows. 评分方面，ClawBench 引入「三重评分机制」，依据任务类型分别采用自动化脚本断言、前沿 LLM 担任「专家评委」，以及两者加权结合的混合评分方式，以期更真实地反映模型在复杂工作流中的实际部署能力。

item.title: 搭载 OLED 的 iMac 机型或于 2029 ~ 2030 年量产
item.guid: 搭载-OLED-的-iMac-机型或于-2029-~-2030-年量产
item.description:
According to ZDNet Korea, Apple recently requested Samsung and LG, two OLED panel manufacturers, to use their mass production lines to produce OLED samples suitable for iMacs, laying the groundwork for the OLED version of the iMac expected to launch between 2029 and 2030. 据 ZDNet Korea 报道，苹果近期已向三星和 LG 两家 OLED 面板厂商发出请求，要求其利用量产线生产适用于 iMac 的 OLED 样品，为预计于 2029 ~ 2030 年推出的 OLED 版 iMac 提前布局。

It is reported that the iMac OLED screen size proposed by Apple to the two manufacturers is 24 inches, with a brightness of 600 nits and a pixel density of 218 PPI. This is an improvement compared to the 500 nits of the currently sold LCD version of the iMac, while the pixel density remains consistent. 据悉，苹果向两家厂商提出的 iMac OLED 屏幕尺寸为 24 英寸，亮度 600nit、像素密度 218 PPI，相比现售 LCD 版 iMac 的 500nit 有所提升，像素密度则保持一致。

item.title: 雷军亲自官宣招募 AI 人才
item.guid: 雷军亲自官宣招募-AI-人才
item.description:
Lei Jun, founder, chairman, and CEO of Xiaomi, announced yesterday that Xiaomi's special AI talent recruitment program has officially launched. 小米创始人、董事长兼 CEO 雷军昨天发文宣布，小米 AI 人才招聘专项正式启动。

Lei Jun stated that Xiaomi's R&D and capital expenditure in the AI field this year reached 16 billion yuan, and significant progress has been made in projects such as foundational large models and embodied intelligent robots. This special recruitment program features three main channels: top talent, campus recruitment, and internships, aiming to create a "one-stop, borderless" AI talent acquisition system. 雷军表示，小米今年在 AI 领域的研发及资本开支高达 160 亿元，已在基座大模型、具身智能机器人等项目上取得重要进展。此次招聘专项设有顶尖人才、校招、实习三大通道，打造「一站式、无边界」的 AI 人才引进体系。

Top talent recruitment targets fresh graduates from 2024 to 2027, post-doctoral fellows completing their programs in 2027, and undergraduate, master's, and doctoral students graduating in 2027 and beyond. Recruitment positions span multiple directions, covering areas such as large models, mobile phones, automobiles, and autonomous driving. 顶尖人才招聘面向 2024 年至 2027 年毕业的应届生、2027 年出站博士后，以及 2027 年及以后毕业的本硕博同学。招聘岗位横跨多个方向，涵盖大模型、手机、汽车、自动驾驶等领域。

Lei Jun introduced that AI technology is fully empowering Xiaomi's human-car-home full ecosystem, covering areas such as smartphones, smart cars, wearable devices, smart homes, and robots. 雷军介绍，AI 技术正在全面赋能小米人车家全生态，覆盖智能手机、智能汽车、可穿戴设备、智能家居及机器人等领域。

According to previous reports, the MiMo model was developed by Xiaomi's core technology team, Core Team. The team's average age is only 25, with over 60% of members graduating from Tsinghua and Peking Universities, and 55% holding doctorates. The youngest core researcher is a 19-year-old university intern. 据此前报道，MiMo 模型由小米核心技术团队 Core Team 研发，团队平均年龄仅 25 岁，清华、北大毕业成员占比超过 60%，博士占比达 55%，最年轻的核心研究员为一名 19 岁的大学实习生。

item.title: 深圳华强北现内存抛售潮：32G DDR5 最低报价跌至 1950 元
item.guid: 深圳华强北现内存抛售潮：32G-DDR5-最低报价跌至-1950-元
item.description:
According to Cailian Press, yesterday, reporters visiting Shenzhen's Huaqiangbei electronics market learned that the spot price of DDR5 memory modules has seen a significant drop since last week. 据财联社报道，昨天，记者走访深圳华强北电子市场获悉，自上周以来，DDR5 内存条现货价格出现明显降幅。

Among them, the price of a single 32G DDR5 memory module, which sold for about 3000 yuan last week, has been reduced by 500 to 1050 yuan this week, with some merchants even selling them off at 1950 yuan/piece . 其中，上周单条售价约 3000 元的 32G DDR5 内存条，本周报价已下调 500 至 1050 元不等， 部分商户甚至以 1950 元/条的价格抛售 。

Some merchants stated, "We just processed a batch of products at 2500 yuan/piece," and currently, some DDR5 products are in a sell-off phase. Regarding future market trends, interviewed merchants hold differing views: some believe prices still have room for further decline, while others think upstream prices are supported, making this round of price cuts unlikely to last. 有商户表示，「刚以 2500 元/条的价格处理了一批产品」，目前部分 DDR5 产品正处于抛售阶段。对于后市走向，受访商家看法不一：有商户认为价格仍有进一步下行空间，也有商户认为上游价格存在支撑，此轮降价行情或难以持续。

An executive from a listed company with memory module business analyzed that this round of sell-offs might be related to weak short-term market demand for PC assembly and downstream merchants' desire for quick turnover, but emphasized that the price correction does not affect the upward trend of the entire storage industry, including memory modules. 一位拥有内存条业务的上市公司人士分析称，此轮抛售或与短期装机等市场需求不振、下游商家希望快速周转有关，但强调价格回调不影响包括内存条在内的整个存储行业的上行趋势。

item.title: Kimi K2.5 上线一个月，月之暗面 ARR 突破 1 亿美元
item.guid: Kimi-K2.5-上线一个月，月之暗面-ARR-突破-1-亿美元
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, about a month after Kimi K2.5 went online, Moonshot AI's ARR (Annual Recurring Revenue) exceeded $100 million in early March. 据界面新闻报道，Kimi K2.5 上线约一个月后，月之暗面的 ARR（年度经常性收入）于 3 月初突破 1 亿美元。

Insiders revealed that after K2.5 went online, the TPM (tokens per minute) quota for API supply quickly tightened. Some clients have already offered multi-million dollar consumption commitments and prepayment guarantees in exchange for priority supply. 知情人士透露，K2.5 上线后，API 供应的 TPM（每分钟 token 数）配额迅速趋紧，已有客户开出千万美元级别的消费承诺及预付担保，以期获得优先供应资格。

Following its $500 million Series C funding round completed late last year, Moonshot AI again saw news in mid-February this year that a new round of over $700 million in financing was nearing completion. According to the STAR Market Daily, its latest valuation has risen to $18 billion, quadrupling within 3 months, and it is currently undergoing a $1 billion financing round. 月之暗面继去年末完成 5 亿美元 C 轮融资后，今年 2 月中旬再度传出新一轮逾 7 亿美元融资即将完成交割的消息。据科创板日报，其最新估值已升至 180 亿美元，在 3 个月内翻了 4 倍，并正在进行一轮 10 亿美元融资。

Additionally, media reported last week that Moonshot AI is considering an IPO in Hong Kong. 此外，上周有媒体报道月之暗面正在考虑赴港 IPO。

item.title: 东方甄选首店下月落地北京中关村，俞敏洪：未来将开上百家线下超市
item.guid: 东方甄选首店下月落地北京中关村，俞敏洪：未来将开上百家线下超市
item.description:
Recently, Yu Minhong, Chairman and CEO of Oriental Selection, revealed during a livestream that Oriental Selection's first offline physical store will officially open in Zhongguancun, Beijing, in April. The store will cover an area of approximately 400 square meters, offering convenience store categories such as fresh produce, snacks, and daily necessities, and will also feature a light meal and coffee beverage area. 近日，东方甄选董事长兼 CEO 俞敏洪在直播中透露，东方甄选首家线下实体店将于 4 月份在北京中关村正式开张，店面面积约 400 平方米，商品涵盖生鲜、零食、日百等便利店品类，并设有简餐和咖啡饮品区。

Yu Minhong stated that once the first store model matures, Oriental Selection will leverage New Oriental's approximately 80,000 employees nationwide to establish two to three Oriental Selection supermarkets in each city, with the total number of stores across the country simultaneously reaching dozens or even hundreds. 俞敏洪表示，首店模式成熟后，将依托新东方遍布全国的约 8 万名员工资源，在每个城市布局两到三家东方甄选超市，届时全国门店数量将同时达到数十家乃至上百家。

In terms of product structure, Oriental Selection's self-operated products account for approximately one-third, with the remainder coming from high-quality goods across the country. 在商品结构上，东方甄选自营产品占比约为三分之一，其余则来自全国各地的优质商品。

item.title: 范式智能首次实现全年盈利，全年营收 71.35 亿元
item.guid: 范式智能首次实现全年盈利，全年营收-71.35-亿元
item.description:
Yesterday, Fancheng Intelligence released its full-year 2025 performance announcement. 昨天，范式智能发布 2025 年全年业绩公告。

Last year, total full-year revenue was RMB 7.135 billion, a year-on-year increase of 35.6%, with a gross profit margin of 34.8%; adjusted net profit attributable to the parent company was RMB 17.84 million, achieving a turnaround from loss to profit. Calculated according to International Financial Reporting Standards, the annual loss attributable to owners of the parent company was RMB 26.30 million, a significant year-on-year reduction of 90.2%.

The performance of the three major business segments is as follows: 三大业务板块表现如下：

    AI Platform : Revenue of RMB 6.552 billion, a year-on-year increase of 32%, accounting for 91.8% of total revenue, serving as a core growth pillar, benefiting from domestic substitution demand and "AI +" policy drivers;

    API Business : Revenue of RMB 79.9 million, a year-on-year increase of 129.2%, the fastest growth rate; Q1 Token revenue this year has already exceeded the total for the entire last year;

    Agentic AI Business : Revenue of RMB 503 million, a year-on-year increase of 93.2%, deeply cultivating industries such as energy and finance with a "pay-for-results" model.

item.title: 顺丰 2025 年报：归母净利润 111 亿，毛利率小幅收窄
item.guid: 顺丰-2025-年报：归母净利润-111-亿，毛利率小幅收窄
item.description:
Yesterday, SF Holding announced its audited results for the year ended December 31, 2025. 昨天，顺丰控股公布截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日止年度经审计业绩。

Full-year operating revenue was RMB 308.23 billion, a year-on-year increase of 8.4%, exceeding RMB 300 billion for the first time; profit attributable to owners of the company (net profit attributable to parent) was RMB 11.12 billion, a year-on-year increase of 9.3%; basic earnings per share were RMB 2.23.

Key data for each business segment are as follows: 各业务板块核心数据如下：

    Time-definite Express: Revenue RMB 131.05 billion, +7.2% year-on-year;

    Economy Express: Revenue RMB 32.05 billion, +17.6% year-on-year;

    Freight: Revenue RMB 42.13 billion, +11.9% year-on-year;

    Intra-city On-demand Delivery: Revenue RMB 12.87 billion, +42.8% year-on-year, segment net profit doubled to RMB 280 million, reaching a new historical high;

    Supply Chain and International Business: Revenue RMB 76.35 billion, +3.2% year-on-year, segment turned losses into profits (net profit approximately RMB 190 million);

    Full-year total parcel volume exceeded 16.7 billion, a year-on-year increase of 25.4%. Gross profit margin was 13.07%, a decrease of 0.61 percentage points from the previous year, mainly due to the drag from rising labor costs.

item.title: 曝 Google 正开发 Android「碰一碰」传文件功能
item.guid: 曝-Google-正开发-Android「碰一碰」传文件功能
item.description:
According to Android Authority, Google will launch a feature called "Tap to share" for Android's built-in Quick Share, similar to Apple's "Tap to share" file transfer feature introduced in the new AirDrop. 据 Android Authority 报道，Google 将为 Android 内置的 Quick Share 推出名为「Tap to share」的功能，效果类似苹果在新版 AirDrop 中推出的「碰一碰」传文件功能。

The earliest clues appeared in September last year. A prototype of NFC-based file sharing had already appeared in the experimental features section of Samsung One UI 8.5, but at the time, the feature seemed more like an internal Samsung test project. 最早的线索出现在去年 9 月。三星 One UI 8.5 的实验性功能区中，已出现基于 NFC 的文件共享雏形，但该功能当时更像是三星内部测试项目。

In the leaked version of One UI 9 exposed yesterday, this feature has been explicitly named "Tap to share," with an intuitive operation logic: bring the tops of two phones close together, and files can be sent. 在昨天曝光的 One UI 9 泄露版本中，这一功能已被明确命名为「Tap to share」（一碰传），操作逻辑直观：将两部手机的顶部靠近，文件即可发送。

Meanwhile, in this year's Android 17 beta and Canary versions, a system-level service named "TapToShare" has appeared. This service relies on Google Play services to run, meaning this feature is expected to become a universal capability for Android, rather than an exclusive feature of a specific brand. 而在今年的 Android 17 测试版和 Canary 版本中，出现了名为「TapToShare」的系统级服务，该服务依赖 Google Play 服务运行，意味着这项功能有望成为安卓的通用能力，而非某一品牌的独占功能。

item.title: 爱奇艺拟赴港二次上市
item.guid: 爱奇艺拟赴港二次上市
item.description:
According to Yicai, iQiyi announced on March 30 that the company has confidentially submitted a listing application form to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, applying for permission for its Class A ordinary shares to be listed and traded on the HKEX. 据第一财经报道，爱奇艺于 3 月 30 日公告，公司已以保密方式向香港联合交易所提交上市申请表，申请公司 A 类普通股在港交所上市及交易许可。

On the same day, iQiyi's board of directors approved a share repurchase program, authorizing the company to repurchase shares worth up to $100 million (including in the form of American Depositary Shares) within the next 18 months, effective immediately upon approval. 同日，爱奇艺董事会批准了一项股份回购计划，授权公司在未来 18 个月内回购至多价值 1 亿美元的股份（包括美国存托股份形式），该计划自批准之日起立即生效。

item.title: 理想汽车马赫 100 芯片论文入围顶级芯片学术圈
item.guid: 理想汽车马赫-100-芯片论文入围顶级芯片学术圈
item.description:
Yesterday, Li Auto officially announced that its research paper on the Mach 100 chip, "M100: An Orchestrated Dataflow Architecture Powering General AI Computing," was recently accepted by ISCA 2026 (International Symposium on Computer Architecture). Li Auto thus became the first enterprise in the automotive industry to have a paper accepted in the conference's Industry Track. 昨天，理想汽车官宣，旗下马赫 100 芯片的研究论文《M100: An Orchestrated Dataflow Architecture Powering General AI Computing》近日获 ISCA 2026（国际计算机体系结构年会）录用，理想汽车也因此成为汽车行业首家在该会议工业分区（Industry Track）获得论文录取的企业。

According to reports, ISCA is one of the most authoritative top academic conferences in the field of computer architecture, focusing long-term on fundamental technical topics such as chips, processors, and AI computing power, and is regarded as a benchmark in the field. 据介绍，ISCA 是计算机体系结构领域最具权威性的顶级学术会议之一，长期聚焦芯片、处理器及 AI 算力等基础性技术议题，被视为该领域的风向标。

The paper introduces the "meticulously orchestrated dataflow architecture" adopted by the Mach 100 chip, which is soon to be mass-produced and integrated into vehicles. The core idea is to allow data to flow directly between computing units, minimizing repeated access in caches. 论文介绍了即将量产上车的马赫 100 芯片采用的「周密编排数据流架构」，核心思路是让数据在计算单元之间直接流动，尽量减少在缓存中反复存取的环节。

Li Auto stated that this architectural design enables the Mach 100 chip to process data more efficiently, unleash more effective computing power, and possess stronger programmability to adapt to the rapid iteration of AI. 理想汽车表示，这一架构设计使马赫 100 芯片的数据处理效率更高，能够释放更多有效算力，同时具备更强的可编程能力，以适应 AI 的快速迭代。

item.title: 💡 彭博社：AI 正在抢走伦敦年轻人的第一份工作
item.guid: 💡-彭博社：AI-正在抢走伦敦年轻人的第一份工作
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, London is experiencing an AI-driven structural crisis in youth employment, and the impact of this crisis is disproportionately concentrated on young people entering the workforce. 据彭博社报道，伦敦正在经历一场由 AI 驱动的青年就业结构性危机，而这场危机的冲击正以不成比例的方式集中落在初入职场的年轻人身上。

According to data cited by Bloomberg, approximately one-third of London's workforce is employed in sectors highly exposed to AI replacement risk, such as professional services, administration, IT, and finance. This proportion is significantly higher than the UK average of about one-quarter. 根据彭博社引用的数据，伦敦约三分之一的劳动者从事专业服务、行政、IT 及金融等高度暴露于 AI 替代风险的行业，这一比例显著高于全英国约四分之一的平均水平。

Daniel Harris, Managing Director of Robert Walters UK & Ireland, pointed out that white-collar employers are extensively using automation to replace junior positions or relocating recruitment to regions with lower labor costs. 猎头公司 Robert Walters 英国及爱尔兰区董事总经理 Daniel Harris 指出，白领雇主正在大规模使用自动化手段替代初级岗位，或将招聘迁移至用工成本更低的地区。

The report also pointed out that the impact logic of AI is asymmetrical. It tends to reward experienced senior practitioners while prioritizing the elimination of entry-level positions that have not yet accumulated work experience. This means that recent graduates, who most need their first job to gain experience, are precisely the group most difficult to bypass this threshold. 报道还指出，AI 的冲击逻辑并不对称。它倾向于奖励经验丰富的资深从业者，同时优先淘汰那些尚未积累工作履历的入门级职位。这意味着，刚刚毕业、最需要第一份工作来积累经验的年轻人，恰恰是最难绕过这道门槛的群体。

According to statistics from the recruitment website Adzuna, the number of graduate positions in London has plummeted from approximately 13,000 in 2019 to about 2,000 at the beginning of this year, a drop of over 85%; the proportion of London positions in the total number of graduate positions across the UK has also shrunk from one-third a decade ago to one-fifth today. 据招聘网站 Adzuna 统计，伦敦的应届毕业生职位数量已从 2019 年的约 1.3 万个骤降至今年初的约 2000 个，降幅超过 85%；伦敦职位在全英国应届毕业生职位总量中的占比，也从十年前的三分之一萎缩至如今的五分之一。

Meanwhile, the unemployment rate for young people aged 16 to 24 in London has climbed to 25%, which is not only the highest in the UK but also higher than the employment levels of their peers in major European cities like Madrid and Paris. 与此同时，伦敦 16 至 24 岁青年的失业率已攀升至 25%，不仅是全英国最高，也高于马德里、巴黎等欧洲主要城市同龄人的就业水平。

A recent computer science graduate confessed: "Everyone is now discussing AI replacing software developers, and it's simply too difficult to compete with a technology that makes mistakes but can be easily corrected by senior engineers." 一位计算机科学专业的应届毕业生坦言：「现在大家都在讨论 AI 替代软件开发者，而与一个犯错但能被资深工程师轻松纠正的技术竞争，实在太难了。」

item.title: 6999 元起，vivo X300 Ultra 正式发布
item.guid: 6999-元起，vivo-X300-Ultra-正式发布
item.description:
Last night, vivo launched two new phones, the X300 Ultra and X300s, at its spring new product launch event. The former is positioned as a professional imaging flagship, while the latter focuses on balanced imaging performance. 昨晚，vivo 在春季新品发布会上发布了 X300 Ultra 与 X300s 两款新机，前者定位专业影像旗舰，后者主打影像性能均衡旗舰。

vivo X300 Ultra: vivo X300 Ultra：

    Equipped with the 5th generation Snapdragon 8 Ultimate Edition;

    3+2 Zeiss Master Lens group, including 50MP 14mm Sony LYTIA 818 ultra-wide angle, 200-megapixel 35mm Sony LYTIA 901 humanistic lens, 200-megapixel Samsung HP0 85mm periscope telephoto, and blueprint primary color camera, supporting full-focal-length 4K 120fps Dolby Vision direct output and 4K 120fps 10bit Log;

    Optional 200mm and 400mm teleconverters;

    Quad microphone array; supports satellite communication (16GB+1TB version only);

    Available in three colors: "Film Green," "Black Ka," and "Silver Tone";

    Priced from 6999 yuan (12GB + 256GB), the 16GB + 1TB satellite communication version is 8999 yuan, and the photographer's kit is 11999 yuan;

vivo X300s: vivo X300s：

    Equipped with MediaTek Dimensity 9500;

    200-megapixel Samsung HPB main camera, Sony LYTIA 602 telephoto;

    6.78-inch flagship flat screen, 8T LTPO + Q10 Plus luminous material, 144Hz high refresh rate, 2000nit peak brightness;

    Available in four colors: Titanium Black, Silver White, Film Green, and Dreamcore Purple;

    Priced from 4999 yuan, the 16GB + 1TB photographer's kit is 7999 yuan, and the G2 teleconverter is 999 yuan.

🔗 Related Reading: vivo X300 Ultra Imaging Review: Imaging Phone, Finally a Camera 🔗 相关阅读： vivo X300 Ultra 影像评测：影像手机，终于成为相机

item.title: Qwen3.5-Omni 上线：215 项 SOTA，还能「听视频写代码」
item.guid: Qwen3.5-Omni-上线：215-项-SOTA，还能「听视频写代码」
item.description:
Yesterday, Qwen released its latest generation all-modal large model, Qwen3.5-Omni, which supports the understanding and generation of text, images, audio, and audio-visual content. 昨天，千问发布最新一代全模态大模型 Qwen3.5-Omni，支持文本、图片、音频及音视频的理解与生成。

The model adopts the Thinker-Talker architecture, offering Plus, Flash, and Light specifications. It supports 256k long context, can process over 10 hours of audio input, and more than 400 seconds of 720P audio-visual input, with training data covering over 100 million hours of audio-visual content. 模型采用 Thinker-Talker 架构，提供 Plus、Flash、Light 三种规格，支持 256k 长上下文，可处理超过 10 小时的音频输入，以及超过 400 秒的 720P 音视频输入，训练数据涵盖逾 1 亿小时的音视频内容。

Compared to the previous generation Qwen3-Omni, this upgrade focuses on: 相较上一代 Qwen3-Omni，此次升级重点包括：

    Multilingual Capability : Speech recognition supports 113 languages and dialects, and speech generation covers 36 languages and dialects;

    Audio-Visual Understanding : The Plus version achieved 215 sub-task/Benchmark SOTA results in audio/audio-visual related tasks, with overall capabilities reaching Gemini 2.5 Pro level;

    Audio-Visual Captioning : Can generate structured, script-level fine-grained descriptions with timestamps;

    Audio-Visual Vibe Coding : The model can directly generate code based on audio-visual instructions.

In terms of real-time interaction, the new version natively supports semantic interruption, WebSearch and complex Function Call invocation, end-to-end voice control, and voice cloning capabilities. 实时交互方面，新版本原生支持语义打断、WebSearch 与复杂 Function Call 调用、端到端语音控制，以及音色克隆功能。

item.title: OPPO Pad mini 曝光
item.guid: OPPO-Pad-mini-曝光
item.description:
Yesterday, blogger 'Digital Chat Station' revealed the appearance and related configuration information of the OPPO Pad mini on Weibo, with the new product expected to be released in April. 昨天，博主「数码闲聊站」在微博发布了 OPPO Pad mini 的外观及相关配置信息爆料，新品预计 4 月发布。

    Equipped with Qualcomm Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 processor, standard with 16GB RAM and 512GB storage;

    Features an OLED screen with extremely narrow bezels on all four sides;

    Supports 67W wired fast charging;

    Available in dark gray, purple, and cyan color options.

item.title: 企业微信开源 CLI，AI 可直接调用消息、日程、文档等办公能力
item.guid: 企业微信开源-CLI，AI-可直接调用消息、日程、文档等办公能力
item.description:
On March 30, WeChat Work launched a CLI open-source project on GitHub, opening up seven core product capabilities including messages, schedules, documents, smart forms, meetings, to-dos, and contacts, supporting mainstream AI Agent calls such as Claude Code, Codex, WorkBuddy, and QClaw. 3 月 30 日，企业微信在 GitHub 上线了 CLI 开源项目，开放消息、日程、文档、智能表、会议、待办、通讯录共七大核心产品能力，支持 Claude Code、Codex、WorkBuddy、QClaw 等主流 AI Agent 调用。

For installation and usage, developers can install the CLI via npm, and after configuring the WeChat Work bot's Bot ID and Secret, they can start calling related capabilities. The current project already provides a series of skills such as messages, meetings, to-dos, schedules, documents, and smart tables. 在安装和使用上，开发者可通过 npm 安装 CLI，配置企业微信机器人的 Bot ID 和 Secret 后即可开始调用相关能力。当前项目已提供消息、会议、待办、日程、文档、智能表格等一系列 skills。

item.title: 泡泡玛特官宣首款跨界家电产品 LABUBU 冷藏箱
item.guid: 泡泡玛特官宣首款跨界家电产品-LABUBU-冷藏箱
item.description:
Recently, Pop Mart officially announced its first cross-industry foray into the home appliance sector with the LABUBU refrigerator, part of THE MONSTERS Home Series. 近日，泡泡玛特官宣跨界进军家电领域的首款产品 LABUBU 冷藏箱，隶属于 THE MONSTERS 生活家系列。

From the official display, this refrigerator features a compact and exquisite overall design. The door is printed with Pop Mart's classic IP characters LABUBU and TYCOCO, and the door handle features a three-dimensional embossed LABUBU design. Currently, the official price, specific configurations, and official launch date for this product have not yet been announced. 从官方展示来看，这款冷藏箱整体造型小巧精致，箱门印有泡泡玛特旗下经典 IP 形象 LABUBU 与 TYCOCO，门把手处更采用 LABUBU 立体浮雕造型设计。目前，官方尚未公布该产品的售价、具体配置及正式上市时间。

Previously, Pop Mart CEO and Chairman Wang Ning announced at the 2025 earnings conference that the company would officially launch a series of derivative small home appliances centered on its own IP in April. The first batch will be simultaneously sold on mainstream e-commerce platforms such as JD.com, with a market strategy planning a phased approach of 'first domestic, then overseas'. 此前，泡泡玛特 CEO 兼董事长王宁在 2025 年业绩发布会上宣布，公司将于 4 月正式推出以自有 IP 为核心的系列衍生小家电产品，首批将在京东等主流电商平台同步发售，市场策略拟采取「先国内、后出海」的分步推进路径。

According to Blue Whale Technology, citing sources, the core OEM factory for Pop Mart's small home appliance business is Xinbao Co., Ltd., with both parties deeply cooperating in an OEM model. Currently, categories covered include electric kettles, coffee machines, electric toothbrushes, hair dryers, and more, and it has now entered the large-scale stocking phase. 据蓝鲸科技援引知情人士消息，泡泡玛特小家电业务的核心代工厂为新宝股份，双方以 OEM 模式深度合作。目前品类已覆盖电水壶、咖啡机、电动牙刷、吹风机等多个品类，现阶段已进入大规模备货阶段。

item.title: 曝豆包正内测「AI 购物」功能
item.guid: 曝豆包正内测「AI-购物」功能
item.description:
According to reports from 'STAR Market Daily', Doubao has integrated with Douyin E-commerce, allowing users to directly order goods and complete payments within the Doubao APP without needing to jump to Douyin. This feature is currently in internal testing. 据《科创板日报》报道，豆包已接入抖音电商，用户可在豆包 APP 内直接下单商品并完成支付，无需跳转至抖音。该功能目前正处于内测阶段。

According to Bian News, after entering questions containing keywords like 'recommend a certain product' in the Doubao APP, Doubao can not only recommend products but also pop up product links. In addition, users can view orders generated from shopping within Doubao in the Doubao APP's 'My - Settings - My Orders'. 另据鞭牛士报道，在豆包 APP 内输入包含「推荐某款产品」等关键词的提问后，豆包除可推荐商品外，还会弹出商品链接。此外，用户可在豆包 APP「我的 – 设置 – 我的订单」中查看在豆包内下单购物所生成的订单。

item.title: 瑞幸「椰子蛋」遭吐槽：太冰、份量少、未封口，门店限量 10 个
item.guid: 瑞幸「椰子蛋」遭吐槽：太冰、份量少、未封口，门店限量-10-个
item.description:
According to Jiupai News and China Newsweek, Luckin Coffee's recently launched new product 'Coconut Egg' (a whole fresh coconut) has sparked widespread consumer complaints on social media platforms. 据九派新闻、中新经纬报道，瑞幸咖啡近期推出的新品「椰子蛋」（一整颗生椰）在社交平台引发大量消费者吐槽。

Many consumers reported multiple experience issues with the product: the drink temperature is extremely low, almost entirely in a slushy state, with staff even suggesting customers wait half an hour before drinking; the portion size is only half that of similar products; the coconut flesh has a poor texture; furthermore, the product is not sealed, making it highly prone to spillage in takeout and delivery scenarios. 多名消费者反映，该产品存在多项体验问题：饮品温度极低、几乎全为冰沙状态，店员甚至建议顾客放置半小时后再饮用；份量仅为同类产品的一半；椰肉口感欠佳；此外，产品未封口，外带与外卖场景下极易洒漏。

In response, Luckin customer service stated that they have received relevant user feedback, and currently, the product supports 'no ice' ordering. Issues regarding portion size, taste, and packaging will be recorded and reported to relevant departments for handling. 对此，瑞幸客服回应称，已收到相关用户反馈，目前该产品支持「去冰」点单，分量、口感及包装等问题将记录并上报相关部门处理。

Meanwhile, the product is in short supply at stores in multiple districts in Beijing. Stores in Xicheng, Haidian, Shijingshan, and other districts in Beijing all show it as temporarily out of stock. 与此同时，该产品在北京多区门店处于供应紧张状态。北京市西城、海淀、石景山等多区门店均显示暂时停售。

item.title: 两轮电动车品牌下月或集体涨价
item.guid: 两轮电动车品牌下月或集体涨价
item.description:
According to Blue Whale News, starting from April, the domestic electric two-wheeler market may experience a wave of concentrated price increases. Leading brands such as Ninebot, Yadea, Tailing, and Aima plan to raise the prices of most of their models, with an expected increase of 200 to 300 yuan. 据蓝鲸新闻报道，自 4 月起，国内电动两轮车市场或迎来一波集中涨价潮。九号、雅迪、台铃、爱玛等头部品牌计划对旗下大部分车型上调售价，预计涨幅在 200 至 300 元之间。

The report points out that regional managers of various brands have intensively notified dealers to increase inventory in anticipation of potential increases in inventory costs and short-term demand fluctuations after the price hike. 报道指出，目前各品牌区域经理已密集通知经销商加大备货力度，以应对涨价后可能出现的库存成本上升及短期需求波动。

According to Yicai, Ninebot confirmed yesterday that due to rising raw material prices, the recommended retail price discounts for some models will be moderately reduced starting in April, with a discount reduction of 100 yuan. 另据第一财经，九号公司昨日确认，受原材料价格上涨影响，4 月起部分车型的建议零售价优惠力度将适度缩减，优惠金额缩减 100 元。

item.title: 《汪汪队立大功：勇闯恐龙岛》发布首支预告，后街男孩献唱主题曲
item.guid: 《汪汪队立大功：勇闯恐龙岛》发布首支预告，后街男孩献唱主题曲
item.description:
According to The Hollywood Reporter, Paramount Pictures' animated film 'PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie' officially released its first teaser trailer and promotional poster yesterday, confirming its North American release on August 14 this year. 据《好莱坞报道》，派拉蒙影业旗下动画电影《汪汪队立大功：勇闯恐龙岛》昨日正式发布首支先导预告片及首款宣传海报，确认将于今年 8 月 14 日在北美上映。

This film is the third big-screen installment in the 'PAW Patrol' series, directed by Cal Brunker. The story follows the PAW Patrol pups who, after a mysterious storm, accidentally crash-land on a tropical island teeming with dinosaurs. They embark on a series of 'dinosaur-level' thrilling rescue missions to stop the villain 'Mayor Humdinger' from madly mining and causing a volcanic eruption. 本片为《汪汪队立大功》系列第三部大银幕作品，由卡尔·布伦克尔执导，故事讲述汪汪队的狗狗们在一场神秘风暴后意外迫降于一座布满恐龙的热带孤岛，在阻止反派「坏市长」哈丁格疯狂采矿、引发火山喷发的过程中，展开一系列「恐龙级」的惊险救援任务。

Notably, the Backstreet Boys specially recorded a new single, 'Bottle Up,' for this film, which will debut as the movie's theme song. 值得关注的是，后街男孩专门为本片录制了全新单曲「Bottle Up」，将作为影片主题曲亮相。

item.title: HBO 确认剧版《哈利·波特》第二季已进入开发阶段
item.guid: HBO-确认剧版《哈利·波特》第二季已进入开发阶段
item.description:
While HBO's TV series adaptation of 'Harry Potter' Season 1 has not yet aired, development work for Season 2 has officially begun. HBO chief Casey Bloys told Variety that the production team is actively moving forward to avoid excessively long gaps between seasons. HBO 剧版《哈利·波特》第一季尚未播出，第二季的开发工作已正式启动。HBO 负责人 Casey Bloys 向 Variety 表示，制作团队正在积极推进，以避免各季之间出现过长的播出间隔。

Bloys stated, 'Our goal is not to have too big of a gap, especially considering the kids are growing up.' He also admitted that due to the massive scale of the series, it won't be possible to release a season every year, but 'they are already writing season two now.' Bloys 表示：「我们的目标是不要有太大的间隔，尤其是考虑到孩子们在不断长大。」他同时坦言，由于剧集规模庞大，该剧无法做到每年播出一季，但「他们现在已经在写第二季了」。

Season 1, 'Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone,' is expected to officially launch on December 25 this year. According to HBO's overall plan, the series will have a total of seven seasons, with each original book corresponding to one season, and each season having eight episodes. Season 2 is expected to adapt 'Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets'. 第一季《哈利·波特与魔法石》预计将于今年 12 月 25 日正式上线。根据 HBO 的整体规划，该剧共计七季，每部原著对应一季，每季八集。第二季预计将改编《哈利·波特与密室》。

Notably, the series' trailer quickly garnered widespread attention after its release, reportedly accumulating over 277 million views within 48 hours of its launch, becoming the most-watched trailer in HBO's history. 值得关注的是，该剧预告片发布后迅速引发广泛关注，据报道在上线 48 小时内累计播放量超过 2.77 亿次，成为 HBO 历史上观看量最高的预告片。
